---
title: "STAT4540_HW6"
author: "John Dennis"
format: pdf
---

### Problem 1

#### Part A

#### Part B

### Problem 2

```{r,message=FALSE,warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(astsa)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
data <- read.csv("FoothillsLab-WindSpeed-20260401-20260402.csv")
data <- data |> 
  mutate(wspd = log(wspd)) |>
  head(288)
```

#### Part A

```{r,results='hide',echo = FALSE, fig.align = 'center', fig.width = 9, fig.height = 4}
tsplot(data$wspd, ylab = "log_wspd")
```

```{r,results='hide',echo = FALSE, fig.align = 'center', fig.width = 12, fig.height = 7}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
acf1(data$wspd)
pacf(data$wspd)
```

#### Part B

#### Part C

#### Part D

#### Part E

#### Part F
